name: AIDLC Pre-Code Generation
description: When aidlc-state.md is updated to Code Generation stage, activates relevant powers (GitHub, Data Engineering, AWS CDK Python, CI/CD) and moves board items.

then.prompt: The aidlc-state.md file was just updated. Read it and check if the current stage changed to 'Code Generation'. If yes: 1) Read .kiro/steering/project-config.md and check the Installed Powers Registry. 2) If 'project-management' power is registered: find the matching GitHub issue (search for 'aidlc:story' label) and move it to 'In Progress' on the board. 3) If 'data-engineering' power is registered AND the current unit involves Glue/EMR/Athena/Spark: activate that power. 4) If 'infrastructure' power is registered AND the unit involves CDK/Terraform/CloudFormation: activate that power (kiro-powers-aws-cdk-python). Use search_cdk_samples_and_constructs for reference implementations and cdk_best_practices for validation. 5) If 'ci-cd' power is registered AND the unit involves new services or pipelines: activate that power. If the stage did NOT change to Code Generation, do nothing.
